description_long: This is a modern, ergonomic desk with a distinctive Z-shaped metal frame and a contoured tabletop designed for user comfort. The tabletop features a two-tone color scheme with a dark central stripe and lighter sides, and a cut-out at the front edge for closer seating. On one side, there is a metal cup holder attachment, and the desk appears to have a cable management grommet on the surface. The legs are sturdy, angled metal supports, providing stability and a contemporary look. The desk's surface is smooth and likely made of laminated wood or MDF, while the frame is constructed from powder-coated steel. This design is both functional and stylish, suitable for high-traffic or tech-oriented urban environments.
description: A modern ergonomic desk with a contoured, two-tone surface, Z-shaped metal legs, and attached cup holder, designed for comfort and stability.
description_view_0: Side view showing the Z-shaped metal leg and attached cup holder on the left.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the contoured cut-out for user seating and the cable management grommet.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the Z-shaped leg visible and no cup holder attachment.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the full width of the desk, both legs, and the cup holder attachment on the right.
attribute_location: gaming room, tech office, or modern home study
attribute_orientation: The contoured edge with the cup holder and cable grommet is intended to face the user, marking the front of the desk; the Z-shaped legs are positioned on the sides.
